channel.title: GitHub Blade Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Blade in GitHub

item.title: laravel/laravel
item.description: Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax. We’ve already laid the foundation for your next big idea — freeing you to create without sweating the small things.

item.title: grocy/grocy
item.description: ERP beyond your fridge - Grocy is a web-based self-hosted groceries & household management solution for your home

item.title: krayin/laravel-crm
item.description: Free & Opensource Laravel CRM solution for SMEs and Enterprises for complete customer lifecycle management.
